### PHASE 3C: STRUCTURED MODULE THREADS

Each of the following threads will become its own Notes-ready export and GitHub-linked unit. These will be recursive, expandable, and system-linked:

| Thread Name | Purpose |
|-------------|---------|
| `::MAP_OS_4BLOOM` | Master architecture for IDs, projects, and cascade |
| `::SYMB0LS_GLYPH_NET` | Symbol assignment across logic and domains |
| `::Qv33R_CORE` | Queer axis — nonfiction, pedagogy, memoir, podcasting |
| `::GR1ND3R_LOGIK` | Dream/horror logic, ARG shell, found footage syntax |
| `::MET4_CORE` | Myth engine, transformation logic, interactive iterations |
| `::ETC_AUDIO_NET` | Audio systems, label structure, live format design |
| `::KONS0L_ARCHIV` | Research index, citation modules, CV infrastructure |
| `::BIZ_MODE_X` | Business structure, product formats, monetization systems |
